title: Broccoli Beef
description: Restaurant-style broccoli beef with tender marinated beef and crispy broccoli in a savory sauce.
instructions: Slice skirt steak against the grain into 1/4 inch pieces
Marinate beef with soy sauce, sesame oil, Shaoxing wine, MSG, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt for 15 minutes
Mix sauce ingredients: dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sugar
Blanch broccoli in boiling water for 3 minutes, then drain
Heat wok over high heat and sear marinated beef until cooked, then remove
Add garlic and ginger to wok, stirring quickly
Add Shaoxing wine around the sides of the wok
Return beef to wok and add blanched broccoli
Pour in prepared sauce and toss everything together
Mix cornstarch slurry (2 tsp cornstarch + 1 tbsp water) and add to thicken sauce
tips: Slice beef against the grain for maximum tenderness
The baking soda in the marinade helps tenderize the beef
Blanch broccoli ahead of time for faster cooking
High heat is key for restaurant-style results
Don't overcook the beef - it continues cooking in the sauce
